Bash(venv/bin/python3 -c "
import json
from features import extract_features

with open\('sample_transactions.json'\) as f:
    txns = json.load\(f\)

result = extract_features\(txns\)
for k, v in result.items\(\):
    print\(f'{k}: {v}'\)

print\(\)
print\('--- Edge cases ---'\)
print\('empty list:', extract_features\([]\)\)
print\('single txn:', extract_features\([txns[0]]\)\)
print\('missing fields:', extract_features\([{'amount': 100}]\)\)
")

Bash(venv/bin/python3 -c "
import json
from features import extract_features
from scorer import calculate_riel_score

with open\('sample_transactions.json'\) as f:
    txns = json.load\(f\)

features = extract_features\(txns\)
result = calculate_riel_score\(features\)

print\('Features:'\)
for k, v in features.items\(\):
    print\(f'  {k}: {v}'\)

print\(\)
print\('Score breakdown:'\)
print\(f'  payment_consistency {features[\\"payment_consistency\\"]} × 30 = {features[\\"payment_consistency\\"]*30:.2f}'\)
print\(f'  counterparty_diversity {features[\\"counterparty_diversity\\"]} / 20 × 20 = {min\(features[\\"counterparty_diversity\\"]/20,1\)*20:.2f}'\)
print\(f'  merchant_ratio {features[\\"merchant_ratio\\"]} × 15 = {features[\\"merchant_ratio\\"]*15:.2f}'\)
print\(f'  income_stability {features[\\"income_stability\\"]} × 20 = {features[\\"income_stability\\"]*20:.2f}'\)
print\(f'  repayment_proxy {features[\\"repayment_proxy\\"]} → {10 if features[\\"repayment_proxy\\"] else 0:.2f}'\)
print\(f'  tenure_days {features[\\"tenure_days\\"]} / 180 × 5 = {min\(features[\\"tenure_days\\"]/180,1\)*5:.2f}'\)

print\(\)
print\('Result:', result\)

print\(\)
print\('--- Edge cases ---'\)
print\('perfect profile:', calculate_riel_score\({'payment_consistency':1.0,'counterparty_diversity':25,'merchant_ratio':1.0,'income_stability':1.0,'repayment_proxy':True,'tenure_days':200}\)\)
print\('empty features: ', calculate_riel_score\({}\)\)
print\('borderline 70:  ', calculate_riel_score\({'payment_consistency':1.0,'counterparty_diversity':20,'merchant_ratio':0.0,'income_stability':0.5,'repayment_proxy':False,'tenure_days':0}\)\)
")

Bash(DATA_PROVIDER=mock python3 -c "
from argentina_features import extract_argentina_features
from argentina_scorer import score_argentina
from providers.mock_provider import MockProvider

mp = MockProvider\(\)

for lid, name in [
    \('a1b2c3d4-0004-0004-0004-000000000004', 'Panadería San Martín'\),
    \('a1b2c3d4-0005-0005-0005-000000000005', 'Ferretería López'\),
    \('a1b2c3d4-0006-0006-0006-000000000006', 'Almacén El Toro'\),
]:
    txs = mp.get_transactions\(lid\)
    m = extract_argentina_features\(txs\)
    r = score_argentina\(m\)
    print\(f'\\n{name}'\)
    print\(f'  runway={m[\\"survival_runway_days\\"]}d  coverage={m[\\"real_cash_coverage\\"]}  fx={m[\\"fx_mismatch_exposure\\"]}  conc={m[\\"revenue_concentration\\"]}  det={m[\\"deterioration_index\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'  action={r[\\"action\\"]}  lights={r[\\"metric_lights\\"]}'\)
")

")

Bash(DATA_PROVIDER=mock python3 -c "
from features import extract_features
from scorer import calculate_riel_score
from providers.mock_provider import MockProvider
mp = MockProvider\(\)
for lid, name in [
    \('a1b2c3d4-0001-0001-0001-000000000001', 'El Patio'\),
    \('a1b2c3d4-0002-0002-0002-000000000002', 'Velásquez'\),
    \('a1b2c3d4-0003-0003-0003-000000000003', 'Tienda Nueva'\),
]:
    txs = mp.get_transactions\(lid\)
    f = extract_features\(txs\)
    r = calculate_riel_score\(f\)
    print\(f'{name}: {r[\\"riel_score\\"]} → {r[\\"recommendation\\"]}'\)
")
